updates.headline: Update 0.5 adds Watkins Glen, Paul Ricard, new cars, and free camera mode
updates.summary: 505 Games logged the 0.5 changelog on 12 February 2026, highlighting new laser-scanned tracks, more cars, a free camera mode, DLSS 4.5, and further work on track limits and dynamic track behaviour.

updates.headline: Early Access 0.2 expands surfaces with Livigno snow and ice content
updates.summary: The official patch notes list Early Access Update 0.2 on 18 December 2025, adding the Livigno scenario, snowy and icy road surfaces, a new rally car, plus bug fixes and performance improvements.

updates.headline: Content Update #5 adds Grandstar, Phaser, Moorfeld, and Challenge Mode
updates.summary: Steam lists Content Update #5 launching on 15 December 2025 with two new vehicles, the Moorfeld track, Challenge Mode, Multiplayer Cup Mode, mud accumulation, and broader stability and audio improvements.

updates.headline: Crimson Desert launched on PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S
updates.summary: The official Steam page shows Crimson Desert released on 19 March 2026, marking the full launch across PC and current-generation consoles.

updates.headline: Pearl Abyss confirmed the 19 March 2026 release date and retail editions
updates.summary: Pearl Abyss announced the physical lineup and confirmed Crimson Desert would release on 19 March 2026 for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S.
